allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:20]\); print\('has ./package.json:', './package.json' in d.get\('exports',{}\)\)")

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content "frontend/node_modules/next/package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $exports = $pkg.exports; if \($exports\) { $keys = $exports.PSObject.Properties.Name; Write-Host "Exports keys \(first 20\):"; $keys | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Host "Has './package.json':"; $keys -contains "./package.json" } else { Write-Host "No exports field" })
Bash(SECRET_KEY=$\(python -c "import secrets; print\(secrets.token_urlsafe\(32\)\)"\) python -c "from app.config.settings import settings; print\('OK, key len =', len\(settings.SECRET_KEY\)\)")
